prompts.name: Black Cat
prompts.text: Add a sleek black cat with glossy fur, bright eyes, natural posture, and subtle mysterious charm.

prompts.name: White Cat
prompts.text: Add a soft white cat with clean fur detail, gentle expression, and cozy domestic presence.

prompts.name: Calico Cat
prompts.text: Add a calico cat with varied fur patches, expressive eyes, and natural playful posture.

prompts.name: Husky
prompts.text: Add a husky dog with thick fur, bright eyes, upright ears, and friendly energetic presence.

prompts.name: Golden Retriever
prompts.text: Add a golden retriever with warm fur, friendly expression, and loyal companion energy.

prompts.name: Shiba Inu
prompts.text: Add a shiba inu with curled tail, alert ears, compact body, and charming confident posture.

prompts.name: Red Panda
prompts.text: Add a red panda with fluffy tail, soft fur, cute face, and gentle forest charm.

prompts.name: Snow Fox
prompts.text: Add a snow fox with white fur, sharp ears, fluffy tail, and quiet winter elegance.

prompts.name: Arctic Wolf
prompts.text: Add an arctic wolf with pale fur, strong silhouette, and calm wilderness presence.

prompts.name: Hawk
prompts.text: Add a hawk with sharp eyes, detailed feathers, and proud perched or flying posture.

prompts.name: Swan
prompts.text: Add a swan with elegant neck, white feathers, and peaceful water presence.

prompts.name: Koi Fish
prompts.text: Add koi fish with bright patterns, smooth motion, and reflective water detail.

prompts.name: Jellyfish
prompts.text: Add glowing jellyfish with translucent bodies, flowing tendrils, and soft aquatic light.

prompts.name: Fireflies
prompts.text: Add fireflies with tiny warm glows, gentle spacing, and magical evening atmosphere.

prompts.name: Moths
prompts.text: Add delicate moths with muted wings, soft motion, and quiet nighttime detail.
